abstract.text: The salt used for vault path derivation (not the encryption salt).

Returns a Boolean value indicating whether two values are not equal.
Errors that can occur during encryption or decryption.
Unified encryption/decryption interface with automatic format detection on decrypt.

Whether this vault can read a file at the given path.
Returns
if the path is within this vault.
Convenience initializer using just a password (default salt, modern format).
The derived vault path, e.g.
The encryption format to use for new uploads. Default is
RNCryptor v3: AES-256-CBC with PBKDF2-SHA1, 10k rounds (backward compatible).
Represents a vault in an encrypted cloud file system.
Retrieve the localized description for this error.
The password used for encryption and vault path derivation.
The vault information (password, salt, derived path).
Creates a vault info with the given password and optional salt.
Creates an encrypted cloud file system.

The encryption format to use when encrypting data.

The underlying cloud file system.
AES-256-GCM with PBKDF2-SHA256, 100k rounds (default for new data).
